## Scope

- [ ] Paper I correction
- [ ] Frozen check correction
- [ ] Documentation-only change
- [ ] Paper II / held research change

## Verification

Describe the exact calculation or source supporting this change. For Paper I or check changes, include an independently reproducible test.

## Freeze boundary

- [ ] This change does not silently mix held Paper II material into Paper I.
- [ ] Any changed certified claim is reflected in the relevant check and documentation.
